title: Episode 9 musical differences
wikitext:
[]: Episode 9 musical differences             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Nov 08, 2012 7:53 pm The bit where Shinji dances with Rei and shames Asuka: Original: http://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_detailpage&v=92MluWutGyg#t=806s What I presume is the Platinum: http://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_detailpage&v=mtP6ZaPLm3g#t=329s There is actually more differences the more you watch it, but the important thing is the musical easter egg, just as Asuka slams the door, you get a few notes of what is unmistakably Cruel Angel's Thesis :)

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Nov 09, 2012 2:04 am I can barely notice it because "I can't stand" Asuka's dubbed voice, nice find anyway,

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Fri Nov 09, 2012 2:57 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: I can barely notice it because "I can't stand" Asuka's dubbed voice, nice find anyway,

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Nov 09, 2012 6:22 am I dont feel as strongly as you guys, but i'll admit Tiff is still getting into her stride a bit in 8 and 9.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Nov 09, 2012 8:22 am Yeah the Change is very subtle but it's there, Nice find. I feel the same way about Grant in the TV series but her performance in the dub of EoE was good.

Article: Episode 9 musical differences
[]: Episode 9 musical differences             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Nov 08, 2012 7:53 pm The bit where Shinji dances with Rei and shames Asuka: Original: http://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_detailpage&v=92MluWutGyg#t=806s What I presume is the Platinum: http://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_detailpage&v=mtP6ZaPLm3g#t=329s There is actually more differences the more you watch it, but the important thing is the musical easter egg, just as Asuka slams the door, you get a few notes of what is unmistakably Cruel Angel's Thesis :)

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Nov 09, 2012 2:04 am I can barely notice it because "I can't stand" Asuka's dubbed voice, nice find anyway,

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Fri Nov 09, 2012 2:57 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: I can barely notice it because "I can't stand" Asuka's dubbed voice, nice find anyway,

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Nov 09, 2012 6:22 am I dont feel as strongly as you guys, but i'll admit Tiff is still getting into her stride a bit in 8 and 9.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Nov 09, 2012 8:22 am Yeah the Change is very subtle but it's there, Nice find. I feel the same way about Grant in the TV series but her performance in the dub of EoE was good.
